mapper.select:
select m.id, m.name, m.url, m.parentid, m.mlevel from menu m where m.state = 1
and m.id in (select mr.mid from menu_role mr where mr.rid=${roleID}
or mr.mid in ('119','120')
or mr.mid in ('101','103')
)
and m.name not in('导入联考卷')
order by m.morder
select id, name, url, parentid, mlevel from menu where state = 2 order by morder
select t.id, t.name from cognition t where t.isdefault = 1 order by t.coorder
select t.id, t.name from arrangement t where t.isdefault = 1 order by t.aorder
select t.id, t.name from Difficulty t where t.isdefault = 1 order by t.dorder
select t.id, t.name from ExamType t where t.isdefault = 1 order by t.eorder
select t.id, t.name from Knowledge t where t.isdefault = 1 order by t.korder
select t.id, t.name, t.E_NAME as E_QTNAME, t.iscon, t.qdesc, t.E_QDESC as E_QTDESC,t.answertypeid,t.isdefault,t.sxb,t.xxdf,t.mediaSet from QuestionType t where t.isdefault = 1 order by t.qorder
select t.id, t.name from Source t where t.isdefault = 1 order by t.sorder

select t.id, t.name, u.id as unitid, u.name as uname from Specialty t left join unit u on u.id = t.unitid where t.state=1 order by nlssort(u.name, 'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M'), nlssort(t.name, 'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')
select t.id, t.name from Unit t where t.state=1 order by t.code
select t.id, t.name from department t where t.state=1 order by t.code

select id,name from department
where unitid = #{unitid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
where 1=1
and state = 1 order by
code
select t.atid as atid, t.iscon as iscon,t.xxdf as xxdf from course_questiontype t where t.qtid = #{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.id, t.name from schoolyear t order by t.id desc
select t.id, t.name from term t order by t.id
select t.id, t.name from examway t order by t.id
select t.id, t.name from grade t where t.name!='null级' order by t.id desc
select t.id, t.name from grade t where id=#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.id, t.name from system_time t order by t.name
select t.id, t.name from query_score t order by t.id
select t.id, t.name from query_paper t order by t.id
select t.id, t.name from test_mode t order by t.id
select t.id, t.name from answer_sequence t order by t.id
select t.id, t.name from correct_paper t order by t.id
select t.id, t.name from forbidday t order by t.id
select t.id, t.cname from role t where t.state = 1 order by t.id
select p.id, p.name, p.type, p.pstring from permission p where p.state = 1

select distinct ei.id as id, ei.ename as ename, ei.cid as cid, ei.cname as cname, to_char(ei.begindate,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as begin, to_char(ei.enddate,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as end, ei.time as time, ei.lock_before as before, ei.lock_after as after, ei.teacherid as chargeid, ei.tel as tel, ei.subjectsum as subjectsum, ei.type as type, ei.bid as bid, ei.addr as addr, ei.remark2t as remark2t, ei.remark2s as remark2s, ei.e_remark2s as e_remark2s, ei.scheckway as scheckway, ei.testtimeset as testtimeset, ei.correctway as correctway, ei.getanswer as getanswer, ei.period as period, ei.testway as testway, ei.missionnum as missionnum, ei.answersequence as answersequence, ei.state as state, ei.sidverify as sidverify, ei.aorb as aorb, ei.addr as addr from examinfo ei
inner join examobject ea on ea.eid=ei.id and ea.specialtyid in('-1',#{spid})
where ei.state in (3, 4) and ei.testtimeset not in (2,8)
and ei.mobile = 2
and ei.mobile in (1,2,3)
and ei.mobile in(0,2,3)
and trunc(ei.begindate) <= trunc((select sysdate from dual)) and trunc(ei.enddate) >= trunc((select sysdate from dual))
and ei.sidverify = 0

select t.id as id, t.ename as ename, t.cid as cid, t.cname as cname, to_char(t.begindate,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as begin, to_char(t.enddate,'yyyy-mm-dd HH24:mi:ss') as end, t.time as time, t.lock_before as before, t.lock_after as after, t.teacherid as chargeid, t.tel as tel, t.subjectsum as subjectsum, t.type as type, t.bid as bid, t.addr as addr, t.remark2t as remark2t, t.remark2s as remark2s, t.e_remark2s as e_remark2s, t.firstpsw as firstpsw, t.secondpsw as secondpsw, t.scheckway as scheckway, t.testtimeset as testtimeset, t.correctway as correctway, t.getanswer as getanswer, t.period as period, t.testway as testway, t.missionnum as missionnum, t.answersequence as answersequence, t.state as state, t.sidverify as sidverify from examinfo t where t.state = 3 and t.mobile in(1,2,3) and trunc(t.begindate) <= trunc((select sysdate from dual)) and trunc(t.enddate) >= trunc((select sysdate from dual))

select epq.qid as qid, epq.iscon as qtiscon, epq.mqid as mqid, epq.ismain as ismain, epq.cid as cid, epq.answertime_bachelor as time, epq.score as score, epq.qtid as qtype, epq.atid as atid, epq.answerid as answerid, epq.content as content, epq.filepath as filepath, epq.th as th,
epq.answerexplain as explain,
a.aid as aid, a.content_6 as acontent1, a.content as acontent2, a.score as ascore from exampaper_question_db epq left join exampaper_answer a on epq.qid = a.qid and epq.eid = a.eid where epq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by epq.th,a.aid

select epq.qid as qid, epq.iscon as qtiscon, epq.mqid as mqid, epq.ismain as ismain, epq.cid as cid, epq.answertime_bachelor as time, epq.score as score, epq.qtid as qtype, epq.atid as atid, epq.answerid as answerid, epq.content as content, epq.filepath as filepath, epq.th as th, eqt.sxb as sxb, eqt.mediaset as mediaset, a.aid as aid, a.content_6 as acontent1, a.content as acontent2 from exampaper_question_db epq left join exampaper_questiontype eqt on eqt.qtid=epq.qtid and eqt.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} left join exampaper_answer a on epq.qid = a.qid and epq.eid = a.eid where epq.qid=#{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and epq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by a.aid

select t.qtid as qtid, t.atid as atid, t.qtname as qtname, nvl(t.e_qtname,'') as e_qtname, t.qtdesc as qdesc, nvl(t.e_qtdesc,'') as e_qtdesc, t.iscon as iscon, t.sxb as sxb, nvl(t.qttime, 0) as qttime, t.score, t.xxdf, t.mediaset from exampaper_questiontype t where t.questioncount != 0 and t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by t.qtorder

select qt.atid as atid, qt.qtname as qtname, nvl(qt.e_qtname,'') as e_qtname, nvl(qt.qtdesc,'') as qdesc, nvl(qt.e_qtdesc,'') as e_qtdesc, qt.iscon as iscon, qt.sxb as sxb from exampaper_questiontype qt where qt.qtid = #{qtid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and qt.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
select * from student_answer_exam where eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and qid = #{qid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

select se.qid,se.score,se.averagescore,eq.th from student_answer_exam se left join exampaper_question_db eq on eq.qid=se.qid and eq.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where se.eid =#{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and se.sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and se.atid in (n'0',n'1',n'2',n'3',n'4') order by eq.th
mapper.insert:
insert into student_answer_exam
eid,
qid,
sid,
qtid,
atid,
answertdate,
answertime,
score,
averagescore,
aid,
content,
content_6,
ismain,
answer_order,
#{eid},
#{qid},
#{sid},
#{qtid},
#{atid},
#{answertdate},
#{answertime},
#{score},
#{averagescore},
#{aid},
#{content_at4},
#{content},
#{ismain},
#{answer_order},
mapper.update:
update student_answer_exam
answertdate=#{answertdate},
answertime=#{answertime},
score=#{score},
averagescore = null,
averagescore = #{averagescore},
aid=#{aid},
content=#{content_at4},
content_6=#{content},
where eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and sid=#{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and qid=#{qid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert when (not exists (select 1 from student_answer_question_exam where eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and qtid = #{qtype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}) ) then into student_answer_question_exam (eid, qid, qtid, sid, qorder, qtorder)
select #{ei_id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{item}, #{qtype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{index}, #{qtorder} from dual

insert when (not exists (select 1 from student_answer_qtype_exam where eid = #{ei_id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}) ) then into student_answer_qtype_exam (eid, qtid, sid, qtorder, qttime)
select #{ei_id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{item.QTID,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{index}, #{item.QTTIME} from dual
mapper.select: select t.qtid, t.qtorder, eqt.qtname, nvl(eqt.e_qtname,'') as e_qtname, eqt.qtdesc as qdesc, nvl(eqt.e_qtdesc,'') as e_qtdesc, eqt.iscon, eqt.sxb, eqt.xxdf, eqt.mediaset from student_answer_qtype_exam t left join exampaper_questiontype eqt on eqt.qtid = t.qtid and eqt.eid = t.eid where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and t.sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and exists ( select 1 from student_answer_question_exam saq where saq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and saq.sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and saq.isfinish = 0 and saq.qtid = t.qtid ) order by t.qtorder

select saq.qid as qid, saq.qtid as qtid, saq.qorder as qorder, saq.qtorder as qtorder from student_answer_question_exam saq where saq.sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and saq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and saq.isfinish = 0 order by saq.qtorder, saq.qorder

select t.qtid, t.qtorder, eqt.qtname as qtname, nvl(eqt.e_qtname,'') as e_qtname, eqt.qtdesc as qdesc, nvl(eqt.e_qtdesc,'') as e_qtdesc, eqt.iscon as iscon, eqt.sxb as sxb, eqt.xxdf as xxdf, eqt.mediaset as mediaset, t.isfinish as isfinish from student_answer_qtype_exam t left join exampaper_questiontype eqt on eqt.qtid=t.qtid and eqt.eid=t.eid where t.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and t.sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} order by t.qtorder

select saq.qid as qid, saq.qtid as qtid, saq.qorder as qorder, saq.qtorder as qtorder, saq.isfinish as isfinish from student_answer_question_exam saq where saq.sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and saq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} order by saq.qtorder, saq.qorder

select saq.qid as qid, saq.qtid as qtid, saq.qorder as qorder, saq.qtorder as qtorder from student_answer_question_exam saq where saq.isfinish = 1 and saq.sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and saq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} order by saq.qtorder, saq.qorder

select saq.qid as qid, ROW_NUMBER() over(order by saq.qtorder, saq.qorder)-1 as num from student_answer_question saq where saq.sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and saq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and saq.isfinish = 0 order by saq.qtorder, saq.qorder

select se.state as state, se.princ_state as princ_state, to_char(se.begindate,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as begindate, se.usetime as usetime, to_char(se.endtime,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as realendtime, se.endtime as endtime, se.login_addr as login_addr, se.addid as addid, se.seat as seat, se.tel as tel, se.isfinish as isfinish from student_exam_exam se where se.sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and se.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
mapper.update:
update student_exam_exam
logintime = #{logintime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
loginip = #{loginip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
login_addr = #{login_addr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert when (not exists (select 1 from student_exam_exam where eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}) ) then into student_exam_exam
eid,
sid,
snum,
enum,
ip,
begindate,
endtime,
seat,
tel,
addid,
login_addr,
usetime,
#{eid},
#{sid},
#{snum},
#{enum},
#{ip},
#{begindate},
#{endtime},
#{seat},
#{tel},
#{addid},
#{login_addr},
#{usetime},
mapper.update:
update student_answer_question_exam
isfinish = 1,
where eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and qid = #{finish,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and isfinish = 0
update student s set s.onlineid = null where s.id = #{sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update student_exam_exam
addid=#{addid},
login_addr=#{login_addr},
seat=#{seat},
tel=#{tel},
isfinish = #{isfinish},
enddate = #{enddate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state},
where eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and sid = #{sid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into teacher_permission(tid, cid, pid) (select #{tid}, '*', 14 from dual)
mapper.delete: delete from teacher_permission t where t.tid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.pid = 14
mapper.insert: insert when (not exists (select 1 from teacher_permission where tid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and pid = 14) ) then into teacher_permission(tid, cid, pid) (select #{tid}, '*', 14 from dual)
mapper.select: select t.id, t.cname as name from role t where t.state='1'

select t.id, t.cname as name from role t where t.state = 1
and t.id in (5,4)
and t.id in (5,4)
and t.id in (5,4)
and t.id in (7,6,5,4)
and t.id in (7,6,5,4,3)

select t.id, t.cname from role t where t.state = 1
and t.id in (5,4)
and t.id in (5,4)
and t.id in (5,4)
and t.id in (7,6,5,4)
and t.id in (7,6,5,4,3)
select c.id as id, c.name_c as name from course_specialty cs, course c where spid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and c.id = cs.cid and c.state = 1
select n.id,n.title,n.addtime,t.real_name as fbr from newstb n left join teacher t on n.fbr=t.id
select r.cname as crole from role r, teacher t where t.id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.roleid = r.id
select * from (select t.id as tid from system_time t where t.name<=#{time} group by t.id,t.name order by t.name desc) where rownum = 1
select 1 from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tp.pid ='40'
select 1 from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tp.pid ='14'
select * from teacher_permission tp where tp.tid = #{tid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and tp.pid in('14','40')
select * from student_jw
select * from unit where name=#{unitname}
select * from specialty where name=#{spename} and unitid=#{unitid}
select * from grade where name=#{grade}
select U01_SEQ.nextval as unitid from dual
select uniqid from TEACHER_SYNCHRONIZATION_JWC where cardid=#{cardid}
mapper.insert:
insert into unit
id,
name,
uorder,
xxdh,
#{unitid},
#{unitname},
#{unitid},
#{xxdh},
mapper.select: select sp01_SEQ.nextval as speid from dual
mapper.insert:
insert into specialty
id,
name,
unitid,
sorder,
xxdh,
#{speid},
#{specialname},
#{unitid},
#{speid},
#{xxdh},
mapper.select: select max(to_number(id))+1 as gradeid from grade
select s.num,s.name,g.name,spe.name,s.class,s.tel from student s left join specialty spe on spe.id=s.specialtyid left join grade g on g.id=s.grade where s.num=#{num} and s.name=#{name}
select stu01_seq.nextval as sid from dual
mapper.update:
update student
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
class = #{klass,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
specialtyid = #{speid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
specialty = #{specialname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
grade = #{grade,jdbcType=INTEGER},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where num=#{num,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select id, name from unit where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select id, name, unitid, uname where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.name from system_time t where t.id=#{id}
select id, name from cognition
select id, name from source
select id, name from knowledge
select id, name from difficulty
select cqt.iscon from course_questiontype cqt where cqt.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cqt.qtid = #{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select id, name from answertype
mapper.insert:
insert into student_exam_login_record
num,
name,
ip,
sid,
eid,
loginTime,
device,
#{num},
#{name},
#{ip},
#{sid},
#{eid},
#{loginTime},
#{device,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.select: select count(s.id) from student_exam_exam se,student s where se.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and se.sid = s.id and s.num=#{num,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
select unitname as name, id from unit_synchronization
select uniqid,cardid from TEACHER_SYNCHRONIZATION_JWC
select id, name from unit where name = #{uname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select uniqid, idcard from teacher where idcard = #{cardid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update unit_synchronization set id = #{id} where unitname = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update unit set name = #{name} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update teacher set uniqid = #{uniqid} where idcard = #{cardid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select id, departmentname as dname, unitname as uname from department_synchronization
select id, name from department where name = #{dname,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and unitid = #{uid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
select de01_SEQ.Currval from dual
insert into department (name, unitid, uname) values (#{dname}, #{uid}, #{uname})
mapper.select: select real_name, employee_num, tel, email, unitname, depname, state ,uniqid,cardid from teacher_synchronization
select count(*) from teacher where name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert when (not exists (select 1 from student_exam_exam where eid = #{eid} and sid = #{sid}) ) then into student_exam_exam
eid,
sid,
snum,
enum,
ip,
begindate,
endtime,
seat,
tel,
addid,
login_addr,
login_addr,
isfinish,
state,
#{eid},
#{sid},
#{snum},
#{enum},
#{ip},
#{begindate},
#{endtime},
#{seat},
#{tel},
#{addid},
#{login_addr},
#{isfinish},
#{state},
mapper.select: select epq.qid as qid, epq.iscon as qtiscon, epq.mqid as mqid, epq.ismain as ismain, epq.cid as cid, epq.answertime_bachelor as time, epq.score as score, epq.qtid as qtype, epq.atid as atid, epq.answerid as answerid, epq.content as content, epq.filepath as filepath, epq.th as th, a.aid as aid, a.content_6 as acontent1, a.content as acontent2 from exampaper_question_db epq left join exampaper_answer a on epq.qid = a.qid and epq.eid = a.eid where epq.qid=#{mqid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and epq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select sa.qid from student_answer_exam sa where sa.answertime<=3 and sa.atid in('5','6','7') and sa.sid=#{sid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and sa.eid=#{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select to_char(lasttime,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as lasttime,time from iprecord where ip=#{ip} and code=#{code}
mapper.update:
update iprecord
lasttime=TO_DATE(#{lasttime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'),
time=#{time},
time=time+1,
where ip=#{ip} and code=#{code}
mapper.select: WITH q_stats AS ( SELECT COUNT(q.id) AS questiontotal, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN q.updatetime >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 30) THEN q.updatorid END) AS last30updator, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN q.time4verify >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 30) THEN q.verifyid END) AS last30verifier, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.addtime >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 30) THEN q.id END) AS last30addtime, COUNT(CASE WHEN q.updatetime >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 30) THEN q.id END) AS last30updatetime FROM question_db q INNER JOIN course c ON c.id = q.cid AND c.state = 1 WHERE q.state != 2 AND q.ismain = 0 ), logintotal AS ( SELECT NVL(SUM(l.count), 0) AS logintotal FROM logintime l ), last7exam AS ( SELECT COUNT(e.id) AS last7exam FROM examinfo e WHERE e.state != -1 AND e.create_time >= TRUNC(SYSDATE - 7) ) SELECT q_stats.questiontotal, q_stats.last30updator, q_stats.last30verifier, q_stats.last30addtime, q_stats.last30updatetime, logintotal.logintotal, last7exam.last7exam FROM q_stats, logintotal,last7exam

select count(q.id) as qcount,a.name as name from question_db q inner join answertype a on TO_CHAR(a.id) = q.atid inner join course c on c.id = q.cid and c.state = 1 WHERE q.state != 2 AND q.ismain = 0 group by a.name
